meaning: n.[摄]干涉图(借助干涉仪得到的冲击波或其他流体的照片)
examples: A new method of interferogram processing is proposed.
The mathematical expressions and interferogram calculation procedures are presented.
The results are given by applying the method to processing a practical shearing interferogram.
The type of image displayed on this page is known as a synthetic aperture radar interferogram.
In this interferogram, the peak ground motion is almost 50cm of motion towards the satellite.
